response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architectural and DevOps exposure — but his title and experience level (Staff/Senior) far exceed the junior/mid-level role, and his heavy focus on DLang, embedded systems, and open-source projects suggests misalignment with the renewable energy platform’s pragmatic, team-oriented needs; also, his German language skill is only basic despite high on-site requirements.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Extensive DevOps and infrastructure exposure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Overqualified with senior/staff titles, risking misalignment with junior role expectations
Dominant use of DLang and niche technologies may indicate poor fit for team tech stack
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement
